texto: I suppose I have become a sort of living monument in Portugal. But I come from a family with roots all over the world, so the idea of patriotism is not very strong in me. My country is the country of Chekhov, Beethoven, Velasquez - writers I like, painters and artists I admire.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Antonio Lobo Antunes: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a familia. O trecho “I suppose I have become a sort of living monument in Portugal. But I come from a family with root…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, family, strong pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de strong e world.

frase_original: I suppose I have become a sort of living monument in Portugal. But I come from a family with roots all over the world, so the idea of patriotism is not very strong in me. My country is the country of Chekhov, Beethoven, Velasquez - writers I like, painters and artists I admire.
